table_metadata.table_description: A day by day record of sales department activity. dates back to the beginnning of 2019.

columns.Index: dummy primary key. likely will not be referenced in querries.
columns.Date: the exact day the resulting data is from. One row corrresponds to data from that specific day. One row per day.
columns.calls: the numebr of calls the sales depertment received that day that got through to a sales representative.
columns.sales: the number of sales the department completed that day. Note: not all sales become activations.
columns.activations: the number of activations that occurred on that day.
columns.brm: Buyer's remorese, defined as the number of customers who deactivated within 30 days of their activation date.
columns.year: the year that date occurred on. Use this column for aggregation purposes, especially when comparing to other datasets.
columns.month: the month the date occurred on. Use this column for aggregation purposes, especially when comparing to other datasets.
